prompt: Full-body nighttime streetwear fashion photo of a young woman with bleached blonde chin-length wavy bob hair, standing casually with both hands in the pockets of her shorts beside a glossy black boxy luxury SUV. She is leaning slightly against the front fender, legs apart in a confident relaxed pose, photographed straight-on with direct on-camera flash for a gritty editorial look. She wears an oversized faded charcoal-gray corduroy cropped sweatshirt with a centered oval anime-girl graphic logo on the chest, loose white athletic shorts, white crew socks, and white high-top sneakers with black swoosh details, plus a thin silver chain necklace. The setting is a narrow urban alley with rough stained concrete walls, dark wet pavement, a curb along the left side, black graffiti reading Wpr on the wall, and the SUV’s round headlight visible on the right. Moody flash photography, realistic skin texture, subtle shadows, desaturated dark tones, candid street style, vertical 9:16 composition.
